---
title: "Intermediate Elective 2"
author: "Rebecca Martinez"
date: "15 May 2026"
format:
  pdf: 
    fig-width: 10
    fig-height: 8
    include-in-header:
      text: |
        \usepackage{fvextra}
        \DefineVerbatimEnvironment{Highlighting}{Verbatim}{breaklines,breakanywhere,commandchars=\\\{\}}
editor: source
execute: 
  message: false
  warning: false
---

# 1. Setup

## Packages

```{r packages}

# general use
library(tidyverse)
library(janitor) 

# file organization
library(here)

# data visualization
library(naniar) 
library(patchwork)  
library(viridis) 


```

## Data

```{r data}

veg <- read_csv(here("data", "veg.csv"))

metadata <- read_csv(here("data", "vp_veg_metadata.csv"))


```
